span.p:
Step 1: Create a wallet
save your recovery phrase

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 2: Register the name
connect wallet, search, choose years

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 91) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
